theorem: APF charged-lepton coefficient closure from capacity-color modulation
claim: The residual operator coefficients close as alpha=0.5 log(N_c), beta=-0.5 log(N_c); for N_c=3, R_l=diag(1/3,3,1). Physical charged-lepton export is not claimed.
